calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name (Amended)
Off Calendar Jan-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Petitioner Marshall William Pisarski present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Marcello Capalbo.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-18-2003 Off Calendar
